title: Dungeons & Crafting
description: Jump into a world of Swords, Sorcery, and Exploration with a Vanilla+ feel!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d4bcdb5ff3c9b1db9e0686e99f3fa59992d4c4.png) ## An RPG Modpack that maintains the Vanilla feel! **Dungeons & Crafting** is the best modpack for those who want to branch out into the best of modern modded content without going too far from the core Minecraft experience. Featuring **eight new classes** from the RPG Series mods, with a simple magic and skills system that fits into the vanilla game, two new dimensions in **The Aether** and **The Otherside**, dozens of new dungeon structures, and **new bosses** added by Bosses of Mass Destruction, plus a fully custom quest book that walks new players through the modded content. Includes integration between all content mods with custom content, tweaked weapon/armor attributes for balanced progression/scaling, custom recipes and mechanics, and tons of config changes to balance and tie all the mods seamlessly together.

I believe this modpack provides the best possible modded experience while still remaining true to the vanilla feel. I began development on this modpack shortly after first getting into modded Minecraft. I searched for a modpack that provided a substantive modded experience, without going overboard and adding too much*. Other modpacks I found claimed to be vanilla+, or a modded enhancement of the classic Minecraft experience, but none felt quite right. As someone who's played thousands of hours in vanilla Minecraft, I wanted something that felt fresh, but also still like the game I know and love. When my search failed, I created for myself that which I had failed to find. Major mods include the RPG Series and Simply Swords for hundreds of **new weapons, armor, relics, & jewelry**, including dozens of late-game legendary gear. The difficulty of the game has also been rebalanced to account for this added gear and class abilities. Also, explore a vast and diverse world with hundreds of new structure mods that add to the overworld, nether, and end (YUNG's Better, Dungeons & Taverns, Moog's Structures, etc.). Also enjoy improved world generation with Tectonic & Geophilic, plus new passive mobs to discover. The nether is overhauled with Better Nether, and the end dimension is overhauled with Enderscape, a mod that I believe maintains the vanilla feel of a desolate end dimension (with a datapack to allow both vanilla and modded end cities to spawn). Plus tons of QoL tweaks and extra content with mods like Charm, Supplementaries, and the entire **Farmer's Delight** suite with all available addons.
### - Some Keybinds - - R to roll - Hold C to zoom scroll to zoom in and out - I to open the questbook - K to open the skills page - Z, V, X, & G for your class abilities - P to toggle shaders - Left Alt to expand tooltips - Y to unfurl sail for small ships - J to eject from immersive aircrafts - F4 for freecam - F8 for Lighty overlay - / (numpad) to open waypoints - \- to clear the EMI search bar - B to use deeperdarker soul elytra boost
**- Client Side Requirements -** Recommended 8GB RAM allocated


Here's a list of the biggest content-adding mods: - AdventureZ - BetterNether - Bosses of Mass Destruction - Brutal Bosses - Charm-forked - Copper Age Backport - Deeper and Darker - Dungeons & Taverns - Enderscape - Fabric Seasons - Farmer’s Delight (+addons) - [Let's Do] Vinery & WilderNature - Friends&Foes - Illager Invasion & It Takes a Pillage - Immersive Aircraft - Moog's Voyager Structures (+Nether, +End) - Overhauled Villages - Rotten Creatures - RPG Series Mods: Archers, Armory, Arsenal, Better Combat, Combat Roll, Critical Strike, Dungeon Difficulty, Paladins & Priests, Relics & Jewelry, Rogues & Warriors, Skill Tree, & Wizards - Simply Swords - Supplementaries - Tectonic & Geophilic - True Ending - Ender Dragon Overhaul - The Aether (+addons) - When Dungeons Arise (+Seven Seas) - Yung’s Better Vanilla Structures (all of them)
